items.title: Stay Focused
items.message: Do one thing at a time and keep moving.

items.title: You Got This
items.message: Believe in yourself and keep trying.

items.title: Take a Break
items.message: Resting can help you come back stronger.

items.title: Stay Positive
items.message: A good mindset can change your day.

items.title: Do Your Best
items.message: You do not need to be perfect, just keep improving.

items.title: Push Forward
items.message: Even a small step is better than stopping.

items.title: Trust Yourself
items.message: You are more capable than you think.
